positive: A symmetrical, intricate illustration of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and stylized coral structures forming a symmetrical mandala pattern. The design must be rendered in clean, high-contrast black and white linework, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Incorporate detailed botanical elements like glowing seaweed strands, stylized jellyfish silhouettes, and geometric ocean patterns. Use a dot-work and engraved etching style to create depth and texture. The composition must be centered, clean, and scalable, resembling a stylized scientific illustration. High contrast, excellent silhouette definition, minimalist color palette (black on white/ivory background).
